name: LEGO 3D PHYSICS BUILDER
summary: LEGO 3D Physics Builder – Simple Pendulum Experiment is an immersive VR learning experience where users can explore a LEGO-style pendulum setup in an interactive 3D environment. Control the experiment with simple actions like start, stop, and reset, and observe real-time motion. Designed for education, it makes physics learning engaging and accessible without the need for physical lab equipment.
